[@microsoft/fast-element/registry.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [whenRegistered](../fast-element.whenregistered/index.html)

## whenRegistered() function

Resolves when the named element is registered with the FAST element registry or defined with the platform custom element registry.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function whenRegistered(name: string, registry?: CustomElementRegistry): Promise<Function>;
```
